**Continue** — add `~/.continue/mcpServers/mnemoverse.yaml` (Continue uses YAML):

```yaml
mcpServers:
  - name: mnemoverse
    command: npx
    args:
      - "-y"
      - "@mnemoverse/mcp-memory-server@latest"
    env:
      MNEMOVERSE_API_KEY: "mk_live_YOUR_KEY"
```
